content.question: What is the magnitude of private family costs (tutoring, test preparation, application fees, foregone time) incurred to compete for 6/8-year gimnázium entry, and how are these costs distributed across socioeconomic groups?
content.reduction_path: Conduct a household-survey study of families with grade 4-5 and grade 6-7 children, eliciting direct expenditures on test preparation and tutoring, time allocation, and subjective barriers to entry; stratify by income quintile and parental education; compare stated willingness to pay and realized investment across demographic groups; link survey data to entry outcomes to measure return on investment by family background.
